ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT customer_settings_id AS "顧客設定ID",
    string_agg((group_name)::text, ','::text ORDER BY group_type_id, (group_name)::text) AS "グループ名s"
   FROM ( SELECT c.customer_settings_id,
            b.group_name,
            b.group_type_id,
            a.active_flg
           FROM ((m_customer_group a
             JOIN m_group b ON ((a.group_id = b.group_id)))
             JOIN m_customer c ON ((a.customer_id = c.customer_id)))
          WHERE ((a.active_flg = 1) AND (b.active_flg = 1))) main
  GROUP BY customer_settings_id;
